{
  "claims": [
    "The 2025-26 budget includes $45.1 billion for three higher education segments and the California Student Aid Commission.",
    "$3.1 billion in total aid is included in the budget for California students.",
    "$2.6 billion is allocated for Cal Grants in the proposed budget.",
    "$527.2 million is proposed for the Middle-Class Scholarship in the budget.",
    "The budget proposes $2.7 billion to implement the $10 billion Climate Bond.",
    "The Climate Bond plan aims to speed up projects to improve water quality in homes, protect communities from floods and droughts, and restore rivers and lakes.",

    "$37.6 million is allocated for the State Water Efficiency and Enhancement Program to improve irrigation systems on farms and ranches.",
    "$35.9 million is designated for the Healthy Soils Program to sequester carbon and reduce emissions through soil health practices.",
    "$19.9 million is allocated for funding invasive species projects as recommended by the Invasive Species Council of California.",
    "$24.9 million is proposed for Farm to School Roadmap for Success programs to benefit California communities."
  ]
}
